case_title: CHARLES, LESLIE ANNE et al VS HALVORSON, PHILIP MR. et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GELUMBAUSKAS, STEVEN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT HALVORSON, PHILIP MR. GELUMBAUSKAS, STEVEN GELUMBAUSKAS, STEVEN MR. CONSOLIDATED WITH CASE #797264 FOR JUDGMENT PURPOSES. CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER STIPULATION BETWEEN PARTIES, WHEREBY THEY ACKNOWLEDGE THAT THERE WAS A MUTUAL MISUNDERSTANDING AND DEFENDANT PAID $2500.00 TO PLAINTIFF IN OPEN COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
